title: Desaturate
description: Reverts all dyeble colors, Including new blocks back to their old colors / pre-1.12 varients
body:
**Overview**

This texture pack changes every dyeble block into its pre-1.12 variants. Even The new ones added in 1.12. Meaning you can enjoy things like colored beds, concrete, glazed terrecotta and candles in the original minecraft colors!   

**Blocks & Items Affected**
- Wool
- Carpet
- Glass & Glass Panes
- Beds
- Banners
- Concrete
- Concrete Poweder
- Terrecota
- Glazed Terrecota
- Pet Collars
- Candles & Their Items
- Shulker Boxes
- Sheep Colors

**Before & After**

![Before (Vanilla Colors)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e78215715f2aef09d0310aee7a4bd125cd900a30.png)
![After (Desaturate)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5af03ef8576c0ffddc7235f00f537af291635c0.png)

**Notice**

Currently only for 1.21.4

Works best with Optifine, which is needed for banners and pet collars to have the old colors.

These textures also work best in combination with programmer art pack and any other retro texture pack.

**To be Completed**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
